notes: Adds a Finance setup wizard inside the Spending Plan area to guide users through inflows, everyday spend, fixed costs and planned irregular costs.
Calculates the weekly cash-flow guidance and suggested automatic payments before saving final spending records.
Writes income, spending and account-role records only after the Review and Save step.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release_notes: Adds a guided Finance setup wizard for inflows and outflows, then shows where income should land and which weekly automatic payments to set up before saving to the Spending Plan tables.
